description: Part 7/10: Add HCS (Higher Category Signal) box management with FULL VISUAL drawing - orange bear boxes, blue bull boxes with thick borders, text labels showing 'HCS BROKEN [tf]'.
steps: Implement ManageHCSBoxes() function (f_manage_hcs_boxes equivalent) - manages HCS box lifecycle with full visual rendering

For bear HCS boxes: When price breaks above top_val, set is_broken=true and CREATE the visual rectangle (OBJ_RECTANGLE) with orange fill (80% transparent), orange border (30% transparent), border_width=2, STYLE_SOLID. Add text object showing 'HCS BROKEN [tf_label]' in white, positioned at top-left of box.
For bull HCS boxes: Same but with blue (#2196F3) fill (80% transparent) and blue border (30% transparent)
Handle HCS box retesting - when price re-enters the box zone after breaking, track retesting state
Handle HCS box invalidation - for bear: delete when low < bottom_val, for bull: delete when high > top_val. Call ObjectDelete for both rectangle and text.
Handle HCS box shrinking - adjust top_val/bottom_val when price partially enters the zone, update rectangle coordinates with ObjectSetDouble
Extend HCS boxes to the right edge (same extend.right behavior as tracked boxes)
Implement HCS detection in the main TF processing loop - detect when FU/SN patterns occur inside existing FU/SN boxes at M50/M60 timeframes, create HcsBoxData and push to hcs_boxes_bear/bull arrays
Commit and push with message 'feat: STX Edge MT5 Part 7/10 - HCS box management with visual drawing'
acceptance_criteria: HCS boxes appear on chart as colored rectangles (orange for bear, blue for bull)
Text 'HCS BROKEN [tf]' appears inside the box
Boxes are deleted when price invalidates them
Box shrinking correctly adjusts visual coordinates
Only M50/M60 timeframes trigger HCS box creation (first HCS count only)
verification: Read ManageHCSBoxes and verify visual creation matches Pine Script exactly
Verify color values match: orange for bear, #2196F3 for bull
findings: Implemented as part of complete single-file rewrite in FEAT-006.
